The problem with generic plans

Generic plans don't work.
Here's why.

📋

One-size-fits-all plans

A 60kg vegetarian woman and an 85kg man cannot follow the same plan. But most apps give them identical advice.

🔄

Plans that never update

Your body changes. Your plan should too. Static plans stop working after 4–6 weeks because your metabolism adapts.

🌍

Plans that ignore your culture

Protein shakes and chicken breast every meal? Real people eat real food from their culture. Your plan should reflect that.

⚡

Fit Ninja solves all three.

Personalized to your body. Recalculated every month. Built around your diet preference — veg, non-veg, eggetarian, or vegan.

Simple process

Your plan in 4 steps.

01
📝
Sign up & pay
₹299/month (~$3.60 USD). UPI, card, or any global payment method. Cancel anytime from your profile.
02
📊
7-step assessment
Tell us your goal, body stats, diet type, activity level, training location and health history. Takes 3 minutes.
03
🎯
Get your plan
Instant personalized nutrition plan, workout program, grocery list, and meal prep guide — all tailored to you.
04
📈
Update every month
Log your weight weekly. Every month, we analyze your progress and recalibrate your calories, macros and program.
What's included

Everything your transformation needs.

🎯

Goal-specific meal plans

Muscle gain, fat loss, weight gain, or general fitness. Each goal gets a different calorie target, macro split, and meal timing strategy based on sports science.

🥗

4 diet types supported

Non-veg, Eggetarian, Vegetarian, or Vegan. Every meal is built around real, local ingredients you can actually find and cook.

💪

Gym & home workouts

Full PPL gym program or home bodyweight program. Set-by-set tracking. Tap each set as you complete it. Days go green when you finish.

▶️

Exercise video demos

Tap any exercise to see a YouTube form guide with coaching cues. Never wonder if you're doing it right. Correct form prevents injury and builds faster.

➕

Custom meal & exercise logging

Ate something not in your plan? Add it with kcal and protein. Did an extra exercise? Log it with sets, reps and weight. Everything tracks.

📈

Monthly coach feedback

Every month, your progress is analyzed. Gaining too slow? Calories increase. Losing too fast? Protein goes up. The plan evolves with you.

🛒

Smart grocery list

Diet-specific weekly shopping list. Tap items as you shop to cross them off. Built around affordable local prices — easy on your wallet, rich in nutrition.

📸

Photo meal logging

Take a photo to confirm you ate a meal. Visual accountability that actually works better than calorie counting for most people.

📱

Works on all phones

Install on iPhone via Safari or Android via Chrome. Opens like a native app with no app store download. Works offline too.

Your diet, your plan

Pick your diet. See your meals.

Sample plans shown use common ingredients — every plan is adapted to what's available in your region.

Why Choose Fit Ninja

How We Compare: Fit Ninja vs. Others

Stop paying thousands for essential coaching. See how our AI-powered premium coach beats traditional training and static apps on features and price.

Personal Trainer (Gym)

Extremely expensive manual option. Highly subject to trainer experience and availability.

  • ❌
    Very expensive: Typically costs ₹5,000 to ₹15,000+ per month on top of gym membership.
  • ❌
    Inflexible schedules: Requires matching hours with your trainer; missed sessions are often lost.
  • ❌
    Prone to templates: Many gym trainers reuse generic workout and diet sheets across multiple clients.
Best Value

Fit Ninja (AI Coaching)

Science-backed premium coaching that adapts to you dynamically, in your pocket, for less than ₹10/day.

  • ✅
    Ultra affordable: Just ₹299/month. All premium features, diet logs, and progress tracking included.
  • ✅
    Truly personalized: Generates individual nutrition targets using Mifflin-St Jeor, tailored to 4 diets.
  • ✅
    Dynamic progressions: Weekly check-in log that recalculates and updates target values every month.
  • ✅
    Fail-safe photo logs: High-efficiency local compression to save image logs even if cloud sync is offline.

Static Apps & PDFs

Rigid calculators and static templates that fail to guide you through plateaus.

  • ❌
    Zero progression: Diet plans and workout routines never change as your body adapts.
  • ❌
    Poor customization: Recommends the same standard meal lists without scaling ingredients to your macros.
  • ❌
    Annoying clutter: Free apps are filled with pop-up advertisements that slow your progress logging.
Questions

Everything you want to know.

Is this plan really personalized or is everyone getting the same thing? +
Every plan is generated individually from your body weight, height, age, gender, activity level, goal, and diet preference. A 55kg vegetarian woman doing 3 days/week home workouts gets a completely different plan than a 80kg non-veg man training 5 days at the gym. Different calories, different macros, different meals, different program.
What if I'm vegetarian or vegan? +
Vegetarian and vegan plans are completely different menus from non-veg — not the same plan with protein swapped out. Veg plans use ingredients like legumes, tofu, dairy, and plant proteins. Vegan plans use tofu, cashew yogurt, oat milk, and plant-based proteins. All built around ingredients you can find locally.
How does the monthly update work? +
Every week you log your weight. After 4 weeks, the app analyzes your rate of gain or loss versus your goal. If you're gaining too slowly, it adds calories. If you're losing too fast, it increases protein. If everything's on track, it keeps the plan the same. The update is shown to you for review before applying.
Do I need a gym or can I do it at home? +
Both. During the assessment you tell us where you train. Gym members get a full PPL program with barbells, dumbbells, and cable machines. Home members get a bodyweight program designed to build real strength with no equipment. Both programs have video form guides for every exercise.
What is the food like? Is it realistic and practical? +
Yes — every meal is built around ingredients you can actually find and afford locally. Plans are designed around your 4 diet choices (non-veg, eggetarian, vegetarian, vegan). Meal prep is designed for one batch-cooking session that feeds you through the week. You can also add your own custom meals anytime.
How do I install it on my phone? +
iPhone: open the app URL in Safari → tap the Share button → tap "Add to Home Screen". Android: open the URL in Chrome → tap the three dots → tap "Add to Home Screen". It works like a native app — full screen, no browser bar, works offline.
Can I cancel anytime? +
Yes — cancel from your profile inside the app at any time. No questions asked, no cancellation fees. You keep access until the end of your billing period.
⚡ ₹299/month (~$3.60) · Cancel anytime

📱 iPhone & Android

Fit Ninja: Your Premium AI Fitness & Nutrition Coach

Welcome to the future of personalized coaching. In a world where premium personal trainers cost thousands of rupees a month and generic fitness apps send you cookie-cutter PDF meal plans, Fit Ninja bridges the gap. We offer a state-of-the-art, interactive AI fitness coach that builds comprehensive training splits and customized diet plans tailored entirely around your body, your dietary choices, your workout location, and your fitness goals for just ₹299/month.

Our coaching algorithm is built on the foundation of proven sports science. First, we compute your daily calorie requirement—your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE)—by analyzing your physical metrics (height, weight, age, activity level, and gender) using the renowned Mifflin-St Jeor equation. Next, we structure your daily macronutrient targets (proteins, fats, and carbohydrates) to match your exact goals, whether you are aiming for fat loss, lean muscle gain, healthy weight gain, or general fitness. Unlike generic trackers that require you to fit into their pre-built plans, Fit Ninja works backwards from your life, creating specialized menus for four distinct diet types: non-vegetarian, eggetarian, vegetarian, and vegan. Whether you prefer a plant-based vegan diet with CASHEW yogurt and tofu or a classic Indian vegetarian plan with paneer, dal, and ghee, every meal is realistic, easy to prep, and accessible locally in India and worldwide.

Our exercise programming is equally advanced. Whether you train in a commercial gym or at home, Fit Ninja generates a customized training plan (such as Push-Pull-Legs gym splits or full-body home splits) that targets your desired muscle groups. Every exercise in your routine is supported by step-by-step form guides and dynamic video demonstrations. You can log your training set-by-set directly in the PWA. If you need to make changes, you can add custom meals or custom exercises to your daily routine anytime, giving you full control over your fitness tracking.

Fit Ninja’s most powerful feature is our Monthly Progression Engine. Every week, you check in by logging your weight. At the end of the month, the engine reviews your progress. If you are gaining muscle too slowly, it adds extra calorie-dense options. If your fat loss stalls, it reduces calories or suggests minor cardio target increases. This mimics the exact decision-making process of a premium personal coach, ensuring you break through plateaus and continue making progress month after month. We also integrate a visual meal logging engine and a fail-safe progress photo log that compresses images locally before upload, saving them directly to your browser's local storage if database connections are offline.

Fit Ninja works seamlessly on all devices as a Progressive Web App (PWA). You can install it on your iPhone via Safari or Android via Chrome in seconds, enjoying a full-screen, lightning-fast dashboard experience that works offline. Secure checkout is powered by Razorpay, with no long-term contracts—cancel your membership from your profile at any time with a single click. Start your science-backed transformation today with Fit Ninja.

Fit Ninja · Premium AI Fitness Coaching
